title: Forms — Premium Design Guide
summary: Author polished Forms with theme presets, layout variants, field-level styling overrides, welcome / thank-you screens, progress indicators, transitions, brand assets, accessibility, and the 14-rule validator. Covers field type catalog with use-cases, conditional logic patterns, hidden-field UTM capture, the 9-step authoring flow (list → create → fields → logic → validate → test-submit → publish → embed → visual-check), three embed methods (standalone / inline / popup), submission contracts, and 10 common gotchas. Use when the user asks 'make this form look good', 'theme my form', 'multi-step form design', 'brand my form', 'Typeform-class form', 'NPS / CSAT form'.
